summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Social Networking features for PARAS REWARD app. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing shows all core features working: Public Profile, Network Feed with Global/Following tabs, User Search, and Messages page. Minor issues found: PRC Rain overlay can block button clicks on dashboard, and /followers/:uid route is not defined.

ui_bugs.issue: PRC Rain overlay (z-50) can intercept clicks on Network and Messages buttons when active
ui_bugs.workaround: Users can wait for PRC Rain to end or navigate directly via URL

missing_routes.issue: Route not defined in App.js - clicking Followers count on Public Profile shows 'No routes matched' error
Route not defined in App.js - clicking Following count on Public Profile would show same error

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add routes for /followers/:uid and /following/:uid pages to show followers/following lists
OPTIONAL: Consider lowering z-index of PRC Rain overlay or adding a dismiss button to prevent blocking dashboard buttons
critical_code_review_comments: PublicProfile.js correctly fetches profile data and handles follow/unfollow with optimistic UI updates
NetworkFeed.js properly implements Global and Following tabs with search functionality
Messages.js correctly handles conversation list and chat view with real-time message sending
All social APIs properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Follow system correctly prevents self-following and handles duplicate follows gracefully

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all core features working, minor overlay issue)

seed_data_creation: Test messages created between testuser and admin during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social networking features fully implemented and working. Backend APIs: public-profile, follow/unfollow, check-follow, followers/following lists, global/network feed, search-users, suggested-users, conversations, send message, unread count. Frontend pages: PublicProfile at /profile/:uid, NetworkFeed at /network-feed, Messages at /messages and /messages/:recipientUid. Dashboard has Network and Messages quick action buttons. Note: /followers/:uid and /following/:uid routes are not yet implemented.

Public Profile Page.details: Shows user avatar, name, badge, followers/following/team counts, Follow/Message buttons, Badges Earned section, Referral code, Member since date

Follow/Unfollow.details: Follow button works, API correctly creates follow relationship, prevents self-following

Network Feed - Global Tab.details: Shows global activity including milestone achievements, follows, team growth

Network Feed - Following Tab.details: Shows activity from followed users, displays empty state when not following anyone

User Search.details: Search input works, shows results with Follow buttons, minimum 2 characters required

Suggested Users.details: Shows suggested users to follow on Global tab

Messages Page.details: Shows conversations list with search, displays conversation count

Chat View.details: Opens conversation, shows messages, has message input and send button

Dashboard Navigation.details: Network and Messages buttons visible on dashboard, navigate to correct pages

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/users/{uid}/public-profile: PASS - Returns profile with followers/following counts, badges, referral code
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/feed/network/{uid}: PASS - Returns network feed from followed users
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/social/suggested-users/{uid}: PASS - Returns suggested users to follow
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/messages/send: PASS - Sends message, creates conversation if needed
